title: Sparkler – “Come Today”
author: Tom Breihan

The post Sparkler – “Come Today” appeared first on Stereogum.
full_text:
Next month, San Diego nouveau shoegazers Sparkler will release a new album called Glidewinder, and we already posted the bliss-drunk lead single "Postal." Today, Sparkler share a smeary, pretty new track. It's called "Come Today," and it does the things that shoegaze tracks are supposed to do. The sighing harmonies and sculpted guitar noises are firmly in the My Bloody Valentine zone, and they really nail what they're going for. I get the impression that these people are not just curating vibes for other people's TikTok videos. Listen below.

Glidewinder is out 4/10 on A La Carte Records.
